remarks: Nestled in the heart of downtown Stamford, this beautifully updated 2-bedroom, 2-bath condominium offers an abundance of natural light, hardwood floors throughout, and a spacious, open layout designed for comfortable everyday living. Both bedrooms feature en-suite bathrooms, providing comfort and privacy for owners and guests alike. The updated kitchen features refaced cabinetry, a stylish backsplash, and newer stainless steel appliances, including a refrigerator, range, microwave, and dishwasher. Enjoy peaceful views overlooking Mill River from your private balcony while being just steps from Stamford's vibrant downtown. This pet-friendly building offers garage parking, an elevator, a fitness center, part-time concierge/doorman service, and a beautifully landscaped courtyard with BBQ grills. Recent updates include a Samsung washer and dryer replaced within the past two years, tastefully renovated bathrooms with new vanities, flooring, and toilets, and a 75-gallon power-vent gas water heater installed in November 2024. Ideally located near Stamford Hospital, Metro-North, I-95, shopping, restaurants, parks, and entertainment, this move-in-ready home offers the perfect blend of modern updates, desirable amenities, and an unbeatable location for commuters and anyone looking to enjoy the best of downtown Stamford living.
